content.title: Port conflict — Nginx won't start
content.description: Nginx is offline. The web server is not responding. Users see a blank page. You have root access.
content.incident: Nginx fails to start. Another process is occupying port 80.
tasks: Read the logs to understand the error
Identify which process is using port 80
Restart nginx and verify it is active
hints: Use systemctl status nginx to see the error
ss -tlnp | grep :80 shows who is using the port
systemctl stop apache2 frees the port if Apache is the culprit

feedback.success: Nginx active. Port 80 free. Incident resolved.
feedback.partial: Nginx is running but the port is still in conflict.
feedback.fail: Nginx is still offline. Re-read the logs.

content.success_message: INCIDENT RESOLVED — Nginx active on port 80 — +80 XP
